intended_use: AIRAscore is intended for automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. This software is intended to automate the current man
intended_use_full: AIRAscore is intended for automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. This software is intended to automate the current manual process of identifying, labeling and quantifying the volume of segmentable brain structures identified on MR images.
target_condition: Brain volumetric analysis; multiple sclerosis (white matter lesions in AIRAscore MS function)
ground_truth: Manually labeled ground truth; test-retest images for reproducibility
other_metrics: Brain segmentable structure volumes and volume changes compared to manually labeled ground truth; reproducibility on test-retest images
